subcodes.title: Words spoken in May 1911 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: Yes, a planet can lose the bounty of God and be destroyed. As man depends on his elements and the brain in particular, so the 'sent Prophets and Manifestations' are like the brain of a planet
subcodes.subjects: @celestial spheres [aflak]; planets; astronomy, @station of the Manifestation of God, @power of the Manifestation of God
